rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"@kody commands in GitHub Discussion require a verb subcommand (full|rerun|fix|fix-ci|review|resolve|status) — bare @kody fails with 'Failed to parse command'.","scope":"CI/kody integration"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A 'build' stage that only runs tests cannot verify pipeline structure (4 stages, PR creation) — a separate review or diff stage is needed to inspect the generated files and PR metadata.","scope":"pipeline verification"}]}
